title: Unit Economics Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Unit Economics skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

customer_acquisition_cost.description: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC): total sales and marketing spend divided by new customers acquired in the period

average_revenue_per.description: Average Revenue Per User or Unit (ARPU): total revenue divided by average active customers or units

direct_variable_cost.description: Direct variable cost per unit (COGS, customer support, hosting, delivery costs attributable to serving one unit)

customer_churn_rate.description: Customer churn rate or average contract duration (for subscription businesses)

expansion_revenue_rate.description: Expansion revenue rate (net revenue retention or upsell rate) for subscription businesses

payback_period_target.description: Payback period target set by management or investors
